gDRcore 1.11.4
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • gDR annotation
    • gDR -- data model
  • Changelog

gDRcore

Processing of drug response data involves merging metadata and raw data into a long DataFrame. This is followed by normalization, averaging, and fitting and ultimately results in drug response fitting metrics.

Website

A package website is available under this link.
